| Sprint   | Capacity |
| -------- | -------- |
| Sprint 1 | 2        |
| Sprint 2 | 2        |
| Sprint 3 | 2        |
| Sprint 4 | 1        |
| Sprint 5 | 2        |

2. Analytics Module cannot be scheduled in Sprint 3.
